name: clawness
description: A Claude Code plugin that puts the right coding rules in context on every prompt, automatically. 117 rules across 18 domains, per-prompt rule injection (BM25 + TF-IDF + RRF + concept expansion, pure Python), a per-codebase lessons-learned memory injected every turn, Bash-output compression, adversarial review sub-agents, slash commands, a default-on (opt-out) plan-approval gate, and session security hardening (an access guard that forces a prompt on likely exfiltration/destructive tool calls, and a trust ledger that flags changed skills/agents). No Docker, no services, no ML models. Requires Python 3.10+ on PATH; on first session a background hook installs PyYAML (the only dependency) into your environment.

hooks.command: for p in python3 python py; do command -v "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/ensure_deps.py"; done
for p in python3 python py; do command -v "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/git_check.py"; done
for p in python3 python py; do command -v "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/memory_init.py"; done
for p in python3 python py; do command -v "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/stack_detect.py"; done
for p in python3 python py; do command -v "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/trust_ledger.py"; done
for p in python3 python py; do command -v "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/claude_hook.py"; done
for p in python3 python py; do command -v "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/compress_output.py"; done
for p in python3 python py; do command -v "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/plan_gate.py"; done
for p in python3 python py; do command -v "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/plan_gate.py"; done
for p in python3 python py; do command -v "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/access_guard.py"; done
